room.caption: [MtTempleD] It's a lot of trouble writing up useless stories of meaningless...

instance.creationCode:
sprite_index=sMermaidCurves soundToPlay=global.snd_HeartPiece stringToShow="You obtained the Mermaid Curves!#Now you can... oh wait, this doesn't grant any new abilities." fadingTime=140 boxSize=2
if global.gameProgress>=1650 instance_destroy()
